ticket.description:
I am trying to investigate why a shipping quote was inaccurate and am not able to view any shipping quote details in the rate request logs. Is the system down?

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/settings/frontendrates/ratelog

comments.body:
Hello Drew,

Thank you for reaching out to us!

I could observe that the rates are loading as expected in the app.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/Jx7q6x5YEgjSo6zkeHUHGNve8/?name=image.png)

If you are still experiencing any difficulty with the rates, please share a complete screenshot from the checkout page so we can take this further.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Sibi
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi,


It is showing the rate log now. It was not before and there was a notification that said there was a failure in the checkout rates.  I was able to see the quote finally and it looks like the discrepancy is how the quote is being requested by PH to FedEx.  If you look at quote Request Id :b5435c9bd7b82b50d2161a7e2ed48b55

It is being sent as a SKID This returns inaccurate quotes from FedEx. This should have been quoted as multiple packages or boxes thus returning an incorrect quote. The customer paid $78.36 and we paid $94.96 to ship it. Is there a setting or somewhere on your backend that this can be corrected?

Thanks

**BULL CITY FLAVORS
919-399-2996
 ![](http://i.imgur.com/oXsKkGt.jpg)**

comments.body:
Hello Drew,

We have updated the sub-package type from Skid to Box under App -> Settings -> Carrier -> FedEx -> Other Details.

Could you please review this from your end using the new rate logs? If you still notice any discrepancy, we kindly request you to try the same shipment on the FedEx website using the same order details and compare the pricing.

Please let us know how it goes or if you need any further assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Drew,
 
We have updated the sub-package type from Skid to Box under App -> Settings -> Carrier -> FedEx -> Other Details.
 
Could you please review this from your end using the new rate logs? If you still notice any discrepancy, we kindly request you to try the same shipment on the FedEx website using the same order details and compare the pricing.
 
Please let us know how it goes or if you need any further assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Drew,

Shipping rates are calculated directly by FedEx based on the shipment details. Ideally, the rates should match. If there is a difference, it usually indicates a mismatch in package details, residential/commercial address, pickup type, or selected special services.

I’d be happy to help you identify the cause and ensure the rates match.

To assist further, could you please share the **rate request log ID** from the app for the shipment you recreated on FedEx.com? Additionally, please provide screenshots from FedEx.com showing the address, package details, and rates so we can compare them accurately.

If it’s easier, we can also go over this on a call. Please use the appointment link [CLICK HERE] to book a time that works for you:

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Drew,
 
Shipping rates are calculated directly by FedEx based on the shipment details. Ideally, the rates should match. If there is a difference, it usually indicates a mismatch in package details, residential/commercial address, pickup type, or selected special services.
 
I’d be happy to help you identify the cause and ensure the rates match.
 
To assist further, could you please share the rate request log ID from the app for the shipment you recreated on FedEx.com? Additionally, please provide screenshots from FedEx.com showing the address, package details, and rates so we can compare them accurately.
 
If it’s easier, we can also go over this on a call. Please use the appointment link [CLICK HERE] to book a time that works for you:
 
Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
